case_title: CUONG HUYNH VS. ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-25-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,813.24 FILED BY HUYNH, CUONG AS TO DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-06-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC. $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUYNH, CUONG AS TO DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-24-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CUONG HUYHN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT. PLAINTIFF WITNESS JENNY HUYNH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY COLIN CARBERRY, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT ASKED THE COURT FOR A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW MORE TIME TO PERPARE FOR THE CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) PAUL (PAVEL) ZINCHIK, OWNER / PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-24-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-24-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF CUONG HUYNH IS PRESENT AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER LINH MUSFELT. DEFENDANT ZINCHIK REAL ESTATE INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PAUL ZINCHIK (OWMER/PROPERTY MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT / D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-24-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 9/9/22; NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO ZINCHIK-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
